case_title: DUPONT, COLYER VS TEMPESTA, BONNIE DBA LA TEMPESTA et al

docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY POS; DEFT, BONNIE TEMPESTA DBA LA TEMPESTA, WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 25 DAYS NOTICE FOR SUBSTITUTED SERVICE FOR OUT OF COUNTY.
THIS CASE ORDERED CONSOLIDATED W/ CASE NO. 756729; THIS JUDMNT IS ISSUED JOINTLY & SEVERALLY AGAINST THE NAMED DEFENDANTS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPESTA, BONNIE DBA LA TEMPESTA SCHMIDT, JOSEPH DBA JOSEPH SCHMIDT CONFECTIONS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DUPONT, COLYER AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPESTA, BONNIE DBA LA TEMPESTA SCHMIDT, JOSEPH DBA JOSEPH SCHMIDT CONFECTIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUPONT, COLYER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEMPESTA, BONNIE DBA LA TEMPESTA SCHMIDT, JOSEPH DBA JOSEPH SCHMIDT CONFECTIONS $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $785.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
